summary: Iteration 29: GHL Integration with WORKING PIT token - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests. Frontend: All UI features verified including funnel display and sale confirmation.
seed_data_creation: None - used real GHL data via PIT token
context_for_next_testing_agent: GHL API is NOW WORKING with PIT token. All endpoints return real data from GHL pipelines (684 opportunities, 33 showed_sold). The sync returns real pipeline data including funnel stages and opportunities. Sale confirmation flow works end-to-end.

test_categories: TestGHLSync - POST /api/ghl/sync returns status='success' with funnel data and total_opportunities (684+)
TestGHLLastSync - GET /api/ghl/last-sync returns most recent successful sync
TestGHLConfirmSale (3 tests) - POST /api/ghl/confirm-sale creates sale records with subscription type/cash
TestGHLSales (2 tests) - GET /api/ghl/sales/2026-03 returns confirmed sales, Create->GET verification
TestConversionRates - Funnel data supports conversion rate calculations

features_verified: GHL funnel section renders with sync button - PASS
All 6 funnel stages displayed (Nouveaux Leads:0, RDV Confirmés:3, Annulés:4, Absents:1, Ventes:33, Perdus:0) - PASS
Conversion rates displayed (Taux RDV: 0%, Taux Présence: 89%, Taux Closing: 100%) - PASS
Ventes à Confirmer list shows 33 sales - PASS
Click Confirmer button opens dialog - PASS
Dialog shows subscription type selector defaulting to '6 Week Challenge' at 599 CHF - PASS
Confirm sale - sale shows as 'Confirmé' (green) in list - PASS

api_endpoint_summary.POST /api/ghl/sync: PASS - Returns status='success', total_opportunities=684, funnel data with 33 showed_sold
api_endpoint_summary.GET /api/ghl/last-sync: PASS - Returns most recent successful sync with all data
api_endpoint_summary.POST /api/ghl/confirm-sale: PASS - Creates sale record with opportunity_id, opportunity_name, subscription_type, cash_collected, month
api_endpoint_summary.GET /api/ghl/sales/{month}: PASS - Returns list of confirmed sales for given month
